revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初七]][[zh:六月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初七]][[zh:六月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初七]][[zh:六月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初七]][[zh:六月初七]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 7|qq=June 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sushun|en|Emperor Sushun|qid=Q349238|lt=Sūshun Tennō|1=Emperor Sushun}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|587|en|587|qid=Q30891|lt=587|1=587}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}}) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|en|Soga no Umako|qid=Q1191233|lt=Soga no Umako|1=Soga no Umako}} and {{ill|Mononobe no Moriya|en|Mononobe no Moriya|qid=Q2424736|lt=Mononobe no Moriya|1=Mononobe no Moriya}} conspired to assassinate {{ill|Anaohobe-no-Ōkimi|ja|穴穂部皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anaohobe-no-Ōkimi|1=Prince Anahobe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11597248}}, who was a rival claimant to the throne. * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1500|en|1500|qid=Q6126|lt=1500|1=1500}} {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|qid=Q2699|lt=July 3|1=July 3}}) – The Gion Matsuri yamahoko parade, suspended during the Ōnin War, was revived for the first time in 33 years. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate fleet bombarded Yashiro Island (Suō Ōshima), marking the start of the second expedition against Chōshū (the Shikoku Campaign). == Births == * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|996|en|996|qid=Q23452|lt=996|1=996}} {{ill|June 25|en|June 25|qid=Q2662|lt=June 25|1=June 25}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Norimichi|en|Fujiwara no Norimichi|qid=Q3090649|lt=Fujiwara no Norimichi|1=Fujiwara no Norimichi}}, who served as {{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} (d. {{ill|1075|en|1075|qid=Q19439|lt=1075|1=1075}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunka|1=Bunsei}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}} {{ill|July 13|en|July 13|qid=Q2687|lt=July 13|1=July 13}}) – {{ill|Umeda Unhama|ja|梅田雲浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Umeda Unhama|1=Umeda Unpin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6561334}}, a Confucian scholar (d. {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}}). * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) – {{ill|Ume Kenjirō|en|Ume Kenjirō|qid=Q3022470|lt=Umeda Kenjirō|1=Ume Kenjirō}}, a legal scholar (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|qid=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|587|en|587|qid=Q30891|lt=587|1=587}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}}) – {{ill|Anaohobe-no-Ōkimi|ja|穴穂部皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anaohobe-no-Ōkimi|1=Prince Anahobe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11597248}}, a prince of Emperor Kinmei (b. unknown). * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|760|en|760|qid=Q30552|lt=760|1=760}} {{ill|July 23|en|July 23|qid=Q2722|lt=July 23|1=July 23}}) – {{ill|Empress Kōmyō|en|Empress Kōmyō|qid=Q837932|lt=Kōmyō-kōgō|1=Empress Kōmyō}}, the consort of Emperor Shōmu (b. {{ill|701|en|701|qid=Q23496|lt=701|1=701}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1616|en|1616|qid=Q6788|lt=1616|1=1616}} {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}}) – {{ill|Honda Masanobu|en|Honda Masanobu|qid=Q845447|lt=Honda Masanobu|1=Honda Masanobu}}, a senior retainer of Tokugawa Ieyasu (b. {{ill|1538|en|1538|qid=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|qid=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}} {{ill|July 2|en|July 2|qid=Q2697|lt=July 2|1=July 2}}) – {{ill|Nakagawa Jun'an|en|Nakagawa Jun'an|qid=Q3020437|lt=Nakagawa Junan|1=Nakagawa Jun'an}}, a Rangaku scholar (b. {{ill|1739|en|1739|qid=Q7002|lt=1739|1=1739}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Ninniku Matsuri|ja|ニンニク祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninniku Matsuri|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 一ノ矢八坂神社|1=Ichinoya Yasaka Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55076890}} at Ichinoya Yasaka Shrine, Tsukuba City, Ibaraki Prefecture, celebrating a local tradition with garlic offerings.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|6|6|8|5|7|7|6|0607|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 6월 7일]] [[ja:6月7日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:六月初七]]
[[ar:June 7 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月初七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月初七]] {{wikidata link|Q839725}} [[Category:Days 7 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar June]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
